dict.string: Undercurrent uses speech recognition to turn what you say into chat messages.
Undercurrent records your voice so you can dictate chat messages.
Undercurrent reads and edits your calendar when you ask it to check, create, or change events.
Undercurrent looks up your contacts when you ask it to find someone's details.
Undercurrent uses your location when you ask for things nearby or for directions.
Undercurrent opens the camera when you ask it to take a photo.
Undercurrent accesses your photos when you ask it to pick or look through images.
Undercurrent reads your step count when you ask about your activity.
